agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Mutating position 5 to aromatic residues (W/F/Y) will enhance SSTR2-specific TM5

report.hypothesis: Mutating position 5 to aromatic residues (W/F/Y) will enhance SSTR2-specific TM5/ECL2 complementarity, while mutating position 11 to hydrophobic residues (L/I/V) will reduce off-target SSTR3/SSTR5 interactions without compromising SSTR2 binding.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current hypothesis remains valid — strong ddG and positive Δmargin indicate

report.hypothesis: The current hypothesis remains valid — strong ddG and positive Δmargin indicate progress toward SSTR2 selectivity. However, structural failures are a major bottleneck. Tightening structural constraints and increasing candidate diversity will help achieve both structural validity and selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: Increase the number of candidates to improve the chances of generating structurally valid designs.
Reduce the clash tolerance to enforce better geometry and avoid steric clashes that lead to poor structural quality.
